## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Senior Java Engineer with 12+ years delivering secure, resilient microservices for superannuation and financial domains. Leads Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x migrations, platform security (CVE remediation), and CI/CD release orchestration. Designed an agentic SDLC with governance gates that accelerated delivery while sustaining coverage and compliance. Bridges legacy stability with modern, testable architectures.
